steps.t: Acorns can be found on the floor of the Silkenhold in northern Fangorn. You should collect acorns to rescue them from a certain unpleasant fate.
Acorns can be found on the floor of the Silkenhold in northern Fangorn. You should collect acorns to rescue them from a certain unpleasant fate.
The distressed Huorn is at the southern stair leading up to the Silkenhood in northern Fangorn. You should show the acorns you rescued to the Huorn.
The nearest sunbeam is south-west from the Huorn at the foot of the stairs of the Silkenhold. You should scatter the acorns to the earth near the beam…
The Huorn is at the foot of the stair leading to the Silkenhold in northern Fangorn. You should return to the Huorn.
Your exploration of Fangorn should continue in the north-west reaches of the forest. You should search for another Ent to the west of the Silkenhold.
